scripts.electron:dev: npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron .
scripts.electron:build: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --mac --config electron-builder.config.json
scripts.electron:build:arm: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --mac --arm64 --config electron-builder.config.json
scripts.electron:build:intel: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --mac --x64 --config electron-builder.config.json
scripts.electron:build:all: npm run clean && npm run build && npm run electron:compile && electron-builder --mac --universal --x64 --arm64 --config electron-builder.config.json
